nasb.text: Furthermore, they made two gold rings and placed them on the bottom of the two shoulder pieces of the ephod, on the front of it, close to the place where it joined, above the woven band of the ephod.

esv.text: And they made two rings of gold, and attached them in front to the lower part of the two shoulder pieces of the ephod, at its seam above the skillfully woven band of the ephod.

cnv.text: 他又做兩個金環，安放在以弗得前面兩條肩帶的下邊，靠近相連的地方，在以巧工做成的以弗得的肩帶上面。

ccb.text: 在以弗得肩带下端、接近腰带的地方又造了两个金环。
